text: Meeting mein Boss ne sabke samne meri aukat dikha di, tabhi se mere sir mein itna tez dard hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi hain. Gaon mein Monsoon ki wajah se fasal barbaad ho gayi aur Sahukaar ka karz sar par hai, isliye shaayad mera sharir bilkul toot raha hai aur thakan khatam hi nahi ho rahi. Mujhe bas ye sir dard thik karna hai taaki main UPSC ki taiyari dobara shuru kar sakun.

Team meeting mein zillat milne ke baad se meri chhati mein itni jakdan aur bhari-pan mehsus ho raha hai ki saans lena mushkil hai. Papa ne kisan hokar apni life savings meri coaching mein laga di thi par ab crop failure se sab debt spiral mein phasi hai, isi wajah se shaayad mujhe raat bhar neend nahi aati. Ye chest tightness thik nahi ho rahi aur lag raha hai ki mera dum ghut jayega.

Boss ki screaming ke baad se mere pet mein ajeeb si marod aur jalan ho rahi hai jo ja hi nahi rahi. PSC dropper hone ka stigma pehle se tha aur ab gaon mein khet sookhne se Papa par sahukaar ka dabav hai, isliye shaayad mera sharir har waqt kaanpta rehta hai. Is thakan aur sharir dard ka koi ilaj batao kyunki main ab aur kamzori bardasht nahi kar sakta.

Aaj meeting mein Boss ne meri capability par sawal uthaye, tabhi se mere poore jism mein ek ajeeb si thandak aur sunn-pan chha gaya hai. Gaon mein kisan credit card ka loan baki hai aur fasal na hone se remittance band hai, isi wajah se shaayad mujhe bhookh bilkul nahi lag rahi aur kamzori badhti ja rahi hai. Ye thakan itni hai ki kitabein uthane ki bhi himmat nahi bachi.

Boss ne team ke samne mujhe itna humiliated kiya ki tabhi se mere kaano mein seetiyaan baj rahi hain aur sir bhari lag raha hai. Crop insurance na hone ki wajah se Papa ka chit fund wala paisa bhi doob gaya, isliye shaayad meri aankhon mein har waqt jalan aur neend ki kami rehti hai. Is bhari-pan ki wajah se main UPSC ki ek line bhi nahi padh paa raha hoon.
